events.text: Carlens Arcus (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Brazil 1, Haiti 0. Matheus Cunha (Brazil) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner following a fast break.
Goal! Brazil 2, Haiti 0. Matheus Cunha (Brazil) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Vinícius Júnior with a through ball following a fast break.
Substitution, Brazil. Rayan replaces Raphinha because of an injury.
Substitution, Haiti. Dominique Simon replaces Carlens Arcus.
Substitution, Haiti. Wilson Isidor replaces Frantzdy Pierrot.
Goal! Brazil 3, Haiti 0. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Lucas Paquetá with a through ball.
Frantzdy Pierrot (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Haiti. Louicius Deedson replaces Josué Casimir.
Substitution, Brazil. Gabriel Martinelli replaces Lucas Paquetá.
Substitution, Brazil. Endrick replaces Matheus Cunha.
Douglas Santos (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Haiti. Lenny Joseph replaces Ruben Providence.
Danley Jean Jacques (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Brazil. Danilo Santos replaces Vinícius Júnior.
Substitution, Brazil. Éderson Silva replaces Bruno Guimarães.
Substitution, Haiti. Derrick Etienne replaces Jean-Ricner Bellegarde.
